plan_phases.description: Months 2–6: Redirect $1,080/month to retirement savings + $765/month to emergency fund

recommendations.title: Set aside tax money this week
recommendations.body: Your tax reserve is $400 of an estimated $1,800 target. Your next quarterly is due in 3 days.
recommendations.next_move: Move $1,400 to a tax-reserve account this week.

recommendations.reason: Your personalised plan: Months 1: Put $1,900/month toward high-interest debt → Months 2–6: Redirect $1,080/month to retirement savings + $765/month to emergency fund

recommendations.action: Put $1,900/month against your high-interest debt to clear it in ~1 month
recommendations.reason: You carry $2,000 in high-interest balances. Compounding above 15% APR erodes net worth faster than any investment can grow it.
Life coverage is one of five resilience milestones; term policies are inexpensive at younger ages.

recommendations.action: Add disability insurance to your benefits
recommendations.reason: Disability is a top cause of unplanned income loss; check whether your employer offers it.
